case_title: ANTHONY TRAVIS ET AL VS. JAIME E. VALLE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE - $0.00 SERVED JUL-18-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALLE, JAIME E. DBA DESIGN 4 BUILDINGS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINITFFS ANTHONY TRAVIS ANS CHAVALA TRAVIS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAIME VALLE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAVIS, ANTHONY TRAVIS, CHAVALA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALLE, JAIME E. DBA DESIGN 4 BUILDINGS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2017 - CONTINUED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER OF THE COURT TO SEP-21-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ANTHONY TRAVIS AND CHANALA TRAVIS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JAIME E. VALLE, DBA DESIGN 4 BUILDINGS. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED TODAY, AUGUST 11, 2017, LESS THAN THE FIVE DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING AS REQURED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 116.340. NO FURTHER SERVICE REQUIRED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER CONTINUING THE HEARING TO SEPTEMBER 21, 2017 AT 8:30 A.M IN DEPARTMENT 506. NO FURTHER SERVICE REQUIRED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
